stemHtml: A flight has been planned based on a forecast true wind of 120°/40 kt. The actual wind experienced in-flight was 240°/40 kt. Assuming a true track of 090°, what will happen?

options.a: The new track will be right of the original track.
options.b: The new track will be left of the original track.
options.d: The new compass indication will decrease.
